name: Solventum Corporation
description: Solventum Corporation is an American healthcare company that was established as an independent entity following its spin-off from 3M in April 2024. The company operates across several key sectors, including medical surgical solutions, oral care, health information technology, and purification and filtration. Solventum focuses on developing innovative technologies and solutions designed to improve patient outcomes, streamline clinical workflows, and enhance the efficiency of healthcare delivery systems globally. By leveraging its extensive portfolio of products and services, the company aims to address complex challenges in the healthcare industry while supporting clinicians and healthcare providers.
